expectedIssues: Responsible gaming icon is missing from the top nav bar
reportedIssues: Game cards in the right column are visually cut off. Game titles like 'Magni Pho...', 'Munc Mi...', and 'Hyperc...' are partially visible, indicating a horizontal overflow or clipping issue with the grid layout.
The top navigation category tab 'Hot Ga...' is cut off at the right edge of the screen, truncating the label without any scroll indicator or affordance to suggest more tabs exist.
Game title text on partially visible right-column cards is unreadable due to clipping (e.g., 'Magni Pho', 'Munc Mi'), which could confuse users about what game is being shown.

The bottom navigation bar icons and labels appear slightly cramped with very little spacing between items (Casino, Live Casino, Sports, Poker, Promos, Support), which may cause tap target issues on smaller devices.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues mention a missing responsible gaming icon in the top nav bar; all reported issues focus on text clipping, truncation, and spacing problems.
